zh-CN.name: 字母Y
zh-CN.intro: 字母Y是字母表中的第25个字母，它像一棵小树，有两根伸向天空的树枝。Y的声音很有趣，试试看：Y！

story.title: 🌳字母Y的故事
story.body: 小朋友，今天我们来认识一个特别的字母——Y！你看，它像不像一棵小树，有两根伸向天空的树枝？又像小叉子，吃饭时帮我们叉食物。让我们大声说：Y！小动物们也喜欢Y，小鸟站在Y的树枝上唱歌：唧唧唧！小鸭子游水，身体也像Y呢。Y还是问“为什么”的小帮手，总是好奇地问：Why？Why？当你和好朋友手拉手，手臂交叉举高高，也变成了Y！字母Y真好玩，我们一起去生活中找找看，哪里有Y的影子？也许在公园的树杈上，也许在妈妈的发卡上。找到Y，你就认识了它！

knowledge.title: Y是从哪里来的？
knowledge.body: 字母Y在很久以前的古埃及，代表着一个带叉的棍子。后来传到英语里，就变成了今天的形状。它既可以是元音，也可以是辅音，很特别哦！

en.name: Letter Y
en.intro: The letter Y is the 25th letter of the alphabet. It looks like a little tree with two branches. Y makes a fun sound: /waɪ/!

story.title: 🌳The Story of Letter Y
story.body: Hello, little one! Today let's meet a special letter—Y! Doesn't it look like a little tree with two branches reaching for the sky? Or like a fork that helps us eat. Let's say it together: Y! The birds like Y too; they sit on its branches and sing: tweet, tweet! When a duck swims, its body sometimes looks like Y. Y is also the letter of curiosity, asking 'Why? Why?' all the time. When you hold hands with your friend and raise your arms, you make a big Y. Letter Y is so fun! Let's go on a hunt and find Y everywhere—on a tree fork in the park, or in mommy's hair clip. Once you spot it, you know Y! Y comes after X and before Z. Many fun words start with Y: yellow, yo-yo, yogurt, and yummy! When you eat yogurt, it's yummy! Y loves to be at the end of words too, like in happy and baby. Y is a playful letter that can sound like /waɪ/ or /i/. So, shout it out: Yippee for Y!

knowledge.title: Where does Y come from?
knowledge.body: The letter Y came from an ancient Egyptian symbol that looked like a forked stick. Later, the Greeks and Romans used it, and it became our Y. Y is unique because it can be a vowel or a consonant, like in 'sky' and 'yellow'.
